en.extract:
The grey-bellied tesia (Tesia cyaniventer) is a species of warbler in the family Cettiidae.
Its range extends from the Himalayas through southern China and Indochina (the Cardamom and Annamite ranges in particular).
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.


Diet
It is an insectivore.


References

The '''grey-bellied tesia''' ('''''Tesia cyaniventer''''') is a species of [[warbler]] in the family [[Cettiidae]].

Its range extends from the [[Himalayas]] through southern China and [[Indochina]] (the [[Cardamom Mountains|Cardamom]] and [[Annamite Range|Annamite]] ranges in particular).

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].

== Diet ==
It is an [[insectivore]].<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Norbu |first1=Lam |last2=Thinley |first2=Phuntsho |last3=Wangchuck |first3=Tandin |last4=Dechen |first4=Ugyen |last5=Dorji |first5=Lekey |last6=Choephel |first6=Tshering |last7=Dorji |first7=Pasang |date=2021-08-26 |title=On the high bird diversity in the non-protected regions of Trashiyangtse District in Bhutan |journal=Journal of Threatened Taxa |volume=13 |issue=9 |pages=19274–19292 |doi=10.11609/jott.6843.13.9.19274-19292 |issn=0974-7907|doi-access=free |hdl=1959.11/51653 |hdl-access=free }}</ref>

zh.extract:
灰腹地莺（学名：Tesia cyaniventer）为鶲科地莺属的鸟类。在中国大陆，分布于西藏、云南、广西等地。该物种的模式产地在尼泊尔。
